attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,CASE WHEN INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 2113 ELSE 2123 END
,BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,BOK.PRODUCT_KEY           
,QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY              
,BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  
,TRADE_IN_AMOUNT* SQ_SS_GP_RATIO TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,BOK.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         /* Added part of True Demand */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_TSS BOK 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL CNTL
ON BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER  INNER_NSOLVT ON (INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO 
ON ( QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.BK_QUOTE_NUM = BOK.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM   
/* AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM = BOK.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER   */
AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID = BOK.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID    ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRODUCTS ON ( PRODUCTS.ITEM_KEY = QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  AND PRODUCTS.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_TSS_BKGS_ALLOCATED ALLOC 
ON ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND ALLOC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
WHERE BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT<>  -9999
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY IS NULL

SELECT 
BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,CASE WHEN INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 2112 ELSE 2122 END
,BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,BOK.PRODUCT_KEY           
,QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY              
,BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  
,TRADE_IN_AMOUNT* SQ_SC_GP_RATIO TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SC_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,BOK.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         /* Added part of True Demand */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_TSS BOK 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL CNTL
ON BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER  INNER_NSOLVT ON (INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO 
ON ( QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.BK_QUOTE_NUM = BOK.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM   
AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM = BOK.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER   )
/* AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID = BOK.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID    ) */
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRODUCTS 
ON ( PRODUCTS.ITEM_KEY = QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  AND PRODUCTS.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_TSS_BKGS_ALLOCATED ALLOC 
ON ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND ALLOC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
WHERE BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT<>  -9999
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY IS NULL

SELECT 
BK_QUOTE_NUM,
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT,
DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT,
TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT,
TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT,
QUOTE_LINE_COUNT,
CASE 
WHEN QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.QUOTE_LINE_COUNT=1 THEN 1
WHEN QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT <>0 THEN SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT / TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT
ELSE
CASE WHEN TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT=0 THEN  0 ELSE  DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT /TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT END  END RATIO
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_QUOTE_GOODS_PRODUCTS QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO
WHERE 1=2

SELECT 
BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,CASE WHEN INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 2114 ELSE 2124 END
,BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,BOK.PRODUCT_KEY           
,QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY              
,BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  
,TRADE_IN_AMOUNT* SQ_GP_RATIO TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,BOK.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         /* Added part of True Demand */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_TSS BOK 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL CNTL
ON BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER  INNER_NSOLVT ON (INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO 
ON ( QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.BK_QUOTE_NUM = BOK.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM   
/*AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM = BOK.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER   
 AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID = BOK.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID  */  ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRODUCTS 
ON ( PRODUCTS.ITEM_KEY = QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  AND PRODUCTS.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_TSS_BKGS_ALLOCATED ALLOC 
ON ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND ALLOC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
WHERE BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT<>  -9999
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY IS NULL

SELECT 
BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_TSS  BOK 
INNER JOIN 
	(
	SELECT NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT , 
	MAX(BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM) BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
	FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV  NSOLVT 
	WHERE  BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM  IS NOT NULL 
	AND NSOLVT.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
	GROUP BY NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT              
	HAVING COUNT (DISTINCT BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM) = 1 
	)  INNER_NSOLVT
ON (INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT = BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
WHERE  BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT <> - 9999 
GROUP BY BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM

SELECT
INNER_SQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM
,INNER_SQ.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
,INNER_SQ.SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT 
,INNER_SQ.DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT          DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT          
,SUM(INNER_SQ.SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT)  OVER (  PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  )  TOTAL_QUOTE_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT
,SUM(INNER_SQ.DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT)  OVER (  PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  )  TOTAL_QUOTE_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT
,COUNT(1)  OVER (  PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  )  QUOTE_LINE_COUNT 
FROM
(
			SELECT 
			BK_QUOTE_NUM  BK_QUOTE_NUM
			,IB.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
			,SUM(SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT)  SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT
			,SUM(INNER_SQ.DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT)          DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT          
			FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE  INNER_SQ
			INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER INNER_NSOLVT1
			ON(INNER_NSOLVT1.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM=INNER_SQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM )
			INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_INSTALLED_PRODUCT IB ON(INNER_SQ.IP_KEY = IB.IP_KEY )
			WHERE INNER_SQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM <> 'UNKNOWN'  
			AND INNER_SQ.SQ_LN_STATUS_CD IN ('Quote Converted','CONVERTED')
			AND INNER_SQ.IP_KEY > 0   
			AND  IB.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY NOT IN (SELECT NOT_MAPPED_ITEM_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_NOT_MAPPED_PRODUCTS  )  
AND 1=2
GROUP BY BK_QUOTE_NUM  
			,IB.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY
) INNER_SQ

SELECT OQ.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER OQ
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_QUOTE_GOODS_PRODUCTS QGP
ON QGP.BK_QUOTE_NUM = OQ.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
WHERE QUOTE_LINE_COUNT =1 
OR  ( QUOTE_LINE_COUNT>1 AND ( SQ_LN_EXTNDD_NET_PRC_TRXL_AMT <> 0 OR DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT<>0 ) )
GROUP BY 1

SELECT 
SOLTV.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_TSS NBM
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NBM.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
GROUP BY 1

SELECT 
QL.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
QL.RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
RPQL.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
IP.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
SUM( DV_SQ_LN_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT)  DV_SQ_LN_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
SUM( DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT     )  DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT 
FROM $$SERVICEVWDB.N_SERVICE_QUOTE_LINE QL 
INNER JOIN $$IBVWDB.N_INSTALLED_PRODUCT IP ON IP.IP_KEY = QL.IP_KEY
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RPQL ON RPQL.ITEM_KEY = QL.SERVICE_PRODUCT_KEY 
WHERE DV_SQ_LN_NET_ADJ_PCT <> 0  AND IP.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY>0 
AND QL.SQ_LN_STATUS_CD IN ('Quote Converted','CONVERTED')
AND QL.BK_QUOTE_NUM IN ( SELECT BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_BKGS_QUOTES)
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4

SELECT
BK_QUOTE_NUM,
RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM,
RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID,
GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
DV_SQ_LN_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT, 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM,RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID ) SQ_SC_SS_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM ) SQ_SC_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM,RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID ) SQ_SS_AMT ,
SUM(DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT) OVER (PARTITION BY BK_QUOTE_NUM) SQ_AMT ,
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_SC_SS_AMT SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO , 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_SC_AMT SQ_SC_GP_RATIO , 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_SS_AMT SQ_SS_GP_RATIO , 
DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT/ SQ_AMT SQ_GP_RATIO 
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SQ_SC_SS_GP_AMT
WHERE DV_SQ_LN_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT <> 0

SELECT 
BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY          
,BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT 
,BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE  
,CASE WHEN INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT IS NOT NULL THEN 2111 ELSE 2121 END
,BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE         
,BOK.PRODUCT_KEY           
,QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY              
,BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  
,TRADE_IN_AMOUNT* SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO TRADE_IN_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT
,DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_NET_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_LIST_PRICE_AMT
,DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_HOLD_COST_AMOUNT
,DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_EXTENDED_HOLD_QUANTITY
,DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT*  SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
,BOK.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG     /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG              /* Added part of True Demand */
,BOK.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG         /* Added part of True Demand */
FROM $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_TSS BOK 
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SRVC_BKGS_PERIOD_CNTL CNTL
ON BOK.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT=CNTL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV ON SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE SOL ON SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = BOK.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_UNIQUE_QUOTE_ORDER  INNER_NSOLVT ON (INNER_NSOLVT.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT= BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)  
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_SQ_SC_SS_GP_RATIO  QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO 
ON ( QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.BK_QUOTE_NUM = BOK.BK_SERVICE_QUOTE_NUM   
AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_TARGET_SVC_CONTRACT_NUM = BOK.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER   
 AND QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID = BOK.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROD_SUBGROUP_ID    ) 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN PRODUCTS ON ( PRODUCTS.ITEM_KEY = QUOTE_AMOUNT_INFO.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY  AND PRODUCTS.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <> 'SERVICE') 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_ICPM_TSS_BKGS_ALLOCATED ALLOC 
ON ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BOK.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND ALLOC.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BOK.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BOK.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
WHERE BOK.DD_BK_SO_NUMBER_INT<>  -9999
AND ALLOC.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY IS NULL
